title: Surrogate-Assisted Techno-Economic Optimization to Reduce Saltwater Disposal via Produced-Water Valorization: A Permian Basin Case Study
description: SpeakForWater Episode 4: Surrogate-Assisted Techno-Economic Optimization to Reduce Saltwater Disposal via Produced-Water Valorization: A Permian Basin Case Study. A podcast conversation between Anna and Ehsan discussing the latest water resources research.
